data.name: Merbert's Tower
data.detailed_description:
10 different Guardians

Over 500 base CGs

Over 200 variation CGs

Voice FX by Pincree (CV:いちくら)

Uncensored by default on Steam, no patch needed

HOW TO PLAY

You can click almost everything. Some items only have descriptions, others can be added to your inventory. However, you can only carry one large item at a time.

Use Ctrl to toggle text windows during conversation. Right click also works, but may accidentally select something when there's a choice on screen, so Ctrl is recommended.

When you see a goblin statue in the upper left, it means there are multiple images. Use the left and right arrows on your keyboard to flip through them. Click the mouse to exit.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

You never know what you might find when you click something.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Press Ctrl or use Right Click to hide text windows.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

A Goblin Statue means there are more CGs in the set.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

data.short_description: You are an apprentice to archwizard Merbert the Pervert. Train with 10 sexy Guardians, browse Merbert’s library of naughty content, and navigate his tower to unleash your full potential!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Microsoft Windows® 10/11 (64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-4340 or better
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGL / VRAM 1GB or better
  • 儲存空間: 650 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
